title: Realms of Redemption
description: 5 new dimensions, with bosses, dungeons and magic!
body:
Welcome to Realms of Redemption!

 

 

Features:

 

5 dimensions:

Cyberland - a blue robot/space themed dimension

Prismacon - a bright crystal themed dimension

Flowerbed - a giant plant/fairytale themed dimension

The Factory - an infinite factory dimension

The Neon City - an infinite cyberpunk city dimension

5 bosses:

Killbot - a giant robot

Corrundodile - a giant corrundum crocodile

Titania - queen of the fairies

Mox - the ghost in the Weather Factory

Neonica - muscular giantess 

Musical and Spellcasting equipment:

Lots of musical instruments and magical wands/books with special abilities! Everything from sniffing out ores to blowing apart mobs with rainbows

New potion effects:

Make use of the Fear, Magic Boost, Music Boost, Silence, Clumsyness, Mana Drain, Deafness, Bravery and Hope effects from Eyelid

Marriable Bosses:

This isn't a joke, Neonica and Mox both have options to give them flowers, talk to them, raise an affection score and eventually propose to and marry at a temple (as well as the usual boss fighting option) And yes, there's both dress and suit options to wear for it, so basically if you want it to the mod has yuri and therefore mogs every other mod in existance

Massive Dungeons:

The moon dungeon is somewhere around 90x90x90, and the weather factory is 166 blocks long, try to remember where the door is

Requirements:

Mod requires Geckolib and Huge Structure Blocks, if you install using the Curseforge launcher these will be downloaded automatically. In-game guide requires Patchouli

Compatibility:

Tag/recipe support for: Alex's Caves, Ender IO, Mekanism, Immersive Engineering, Twilight Forest, Shadowlands, Dungeons Arise, Blood Magic, Create, Thermal Expansion and Eyelid

This compatibility means that machines from tech mods can process materials from this mod, structures can generate in certain modded biomes, and items from this mod will be in the right tags from those mods

 

Recommended Mods:

Geckolib (required), Huge Structure Blocks (required), Patchouli (for the guide book), JEI (for viewing recipies), JER (for listing mob drops), other QOL mods if you want

 

Modpack/addon developer info:

Config:

 

Boss attributes: boss health/damage can be set in config

Dialogue can be controlled through lang files as well as the config to allow more or less dialogue elements to be used

 

Useful tags:

 

Assume mod id for tags is ror unless otherwise stated

  

items/acid_container - items which are used in the acid processing crafting recipes

items/can_mine_galactite - items which can mine galactite ore

items/magical - used in the items/repairable tag to allow the repair spell to work on them

items/musical- used in the items/repairable tag to allow the repair spell to work on them

items/repairable - items repairable with the repair spell

items/neonica_wanted_items - items which Neonica and Mox can ask for

items/random_items - items which Neon Residents can ask for

items/recyclable_metal - items which can be smelted into iron nuggets

items/shiny_stuff - items which can be dropped by the Bag of Shiny Stuff item

items/wedding_clothes - items which when worn can progress the Prismkeeper dialogue when trying to get married

entities/force_field_immune - mobs which can pass through moon dungeon force fields with no damage

entities/robots - mobs which are set on fire by the Cutting Torch

entities/undetectable - used for mobs which the Radar Wand should not detect and say the names of

eyelid/entities/musical_anger_ability_immune - mobs which are not affected my the Anger ability of some musical items (use for mobs which should never attack the player but otherwise could)

blocks/corrundodile_crushable - blocks which Corrundodile can break

 

 

FAQs:

Q: Will you port to x version? A: Porting a mod this size would take a long time, I will likely update to later versions eventually, but it will take a while and backports are not happening.

 

Q: Do I need the Huge Structure Blocks mod? A: The weather factory is (I think) the only structure which requires it, due to its size it will not generate at all if the mod is not present.

 

Q: Where is the wiki? A: There is an in-game guide as well as lots of tooltips, and FTB quest files available for anyone who wants them, a wiki is not really needed but you are welcome to make one.

 

FTB Quests file:

Add this to the chapters folder in your FTB Quests config to use them https://drive.google.com/file/d/1GsV6AvAx-f5JAUf6kxZ0TDzLfsUMh-W7/view?usp=sharing

 

Credits:

Credits:

(All content used from other creators is believed to be used as allowed by the individual content's licence, with written permission being obtained in most cases, if any mistakes have been made please contact me so I can fix them)

Several natural/gemstone block textures by TugkanDeMan https://mcmodels.net/vendors/23/tugkandeman
Guardbot texture by Nitgo https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/nitgo
Prismkeeper skin by Findolphin https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/findolphin/
Temple build by Trydar: https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/minecraft-alien-pyramid/
Skyscraper exteriors and crystal structures by Horace Creations https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/horace_creations/
Several armor/tool textures by Cubosynth https://builtbybit.com/creators/cubosynth.474887
Comissioned Titania model and texture by Crydigo - https://x.com/crydigo
Comissioned status effect, lute, french horn and electric guitar textures by Pixel_Goblin https://x.com/Other_Goblin

Sounds:

OST by SocialTag (https://www.youtube.com/@SocialTag)

Lots of sounds from Pixabay -- https://pixabay.com/
Bard solo fun and Bard melody (Lute sounds), by Akrythael -- https://freesound.org/s/334919/
Country Guitar Twang.wav (Electric Guitar sound) by blindhouse99 -- https://freesound.org/s/632723/
mfMetal_short_pwrchrd_Astr_D#.wav and several other sounds in the same pack (electric guitar sounds) by mikey_eff -- https://freesound.org/s/97221/
spaceghost.WAV (googloid mob sound) by NoiseCollector -- https://freesound.org/s/41901/

Insperations/not directly used stuff:

Inspiration for several dimensions and concepts: some old concepts from Xolova's Advent of Ascension mod https://x.com/mcxolova, Terraria by Redidgit https://x.com/Demilogic, Rainbow Factory by Aurora Dawn (I 100% cannot get away with linking you here sorry), and Tron

Other:

Mathmatical help from my younger brother

 

Final notes: 100% did not need to make the bosses marriable that was a huge dev time sink, however it's also kinda funny so I'm keeping it.

 

Reuploads to sites such as 9minecraft will lead to DMCAs being sent.
